ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Continued To Jan-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court notes that there is a petition in the e-filing queue.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jan-03-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

***After hearing: with approval from the court, the courtroom clerk reviews the petition pending in the e-filing queue and notes that it is a Report of Status of Administration but that it includes today's hearing date which will eventually be rejected by the filing clerk. As a courtesy, Mr. Dare, counsel for the Administrator, is advised via voicemail that his pending report will be rejected by the courtroom clerk and that he will need to resubmit his petition without today's date as the filing clerk will provide a new hearing date.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Continued To Nov-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Byron Dare, via ZOOM, for Jennifer Contini, Personal Representative.

The court at the outset queries counsel regarding the status of filing of either a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status of administration. Counsel reports that he has been attempting to contact the Franchise Tax Board for the past two months to obtain documents but that he has yet to receive a reply. The court then confirms with counsel that his petition will be ready to file as soon as he receives said documents. The court instructs counsel that he is expected to file either a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status of administration before the next calling of this matter.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Nov-29-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: E. Prado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Continued To Sep-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Jennifer M. Contini and Attorney Byron L. Dare to appear on September 27, 2021, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. The Status Hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Byron Dare, via ZOOM, for Jennifer Contini, Personal Representative.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of this matter. Counsel reports that the newly appointed probate referee has not completed the appraisal and that the only asset is real property. Counsel requests a continuance.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 9, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-22-2021 Continued To Jul-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Byron Dare appeared by zoom for Jennifer Contini (Executor).

Mr. Dare stated that the only asset is a piece of real estate in San Francisco, that the assigned Probate Referee retired without doing any work on the estate, that the substituted Referee was appointed on February 25th and that the last contact he had with the Referee was on Friday. Mr. Dare also stated that the Referee had not received any information from the Court regarding her appointment, that the Referee had not received the packet from the Court, that there is a lot of debt and requested a 30-day continuance. The Court informed Mr. Dare that the process is for them to make sure Ms. Simons is aware that she has been appointed and for his Client to file an inventory and appraisal. Status on close of estate is continued to July 12, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Continued To Mar-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
